suspected_drug.desc: drug the note attributes the adverse event to, as named in the note

adverse_event.desc: the adverse event itself, as the clinician described it

severity_grade.desc: CTCAE or descriptive grade as stated

action_taken.desc: dose held / reduced / discontinued / none — as stated

onset_relative_to_drug.desc: timing of the event relative to the drug, as stated

dechallenge_result.desc: did the event improve after stopping the drug

rechallenge_result.desc: did the event recur after restarting the drug
